title: Setting values of "SP Estimated" column
excerpt: In Monday dev, can the “Estimated SP” column labels be defined. For instance, with the Fibonacci sequence (1,2,3,5,8).

posts.author: timinator (Tim Howard)
posts.cookedHtml: In Monday dev, can the “Estimated SP” column labels be defined. For instance, with the Fibonacci sequence (1,2,3,5,8).
